overall.description: A character in a red wizard robe walks through a snowy castle courtyard at night in a video game. The scene features Gothic architecture, snow-covered mountains in the background, and transitions from an open walkway to a covered arched corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy castle walkway with mountain overlook

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy path beside the castle wall with mountains visible to the right

snowy mountain peaks under dark blue night sky
stone parapet wall lining the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow snowy path between a tall stone castle wall and an open overlook. Snow-covered mountains are visible in the distance under a dark night sky, with the path illuminated by ambient moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle walkway with vintage street lighting

events.description: passing under warm glowing vintage street lamps along the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path, passing illuminated street lamps and stained glass windows

illuminated Gothic window with colored glass panes

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the castle walkway, now passing vintage street lamps that cast warm pools of light on the snow. Stained glass windows glow from within the stone wall to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle overlook with descending stairs and horse statue

events.description: turning the corner to reveal the open overlook with descending stairs
descending stone stairs along the balustrade overlooking the valley

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking down the snowy stairs, passing a large horse statue

large dark statue of a rearing horse on a circular pedestal

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wide overlook as the character turns and descends snow-covered stairs. A dramatic horse statue stands on a pedestal ahead, while the balustrade offers views of the snowy valley below.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered Gothic walkway with illuminated arches

events.description: entering the covered Gothic walkway with stone arches and warm interior lighting

agents.ego_description: walking into the illuminated covered corridor with Gothic arches and stone pillars

entered.detail: ornate stone archway marking entrance to covered walkway
row of Gothic stone columns supporting the covered roof

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered Gothic walkway with ornate stone arches and pillars. The space is illuminated by warm artificial lighting, creating a sheltered corridor that contrasts with the open snowy exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cold, moonlit castle exterior that gradually transitions into a sheltered, warmly lit Gothic corridor. It begins with a character walking along a narrow snowy path between a towering stone wall and an open overlook of distant, snow-covered mountains under a dark night sky. As the character continues, the ambient moonlight is joined by the warm glow of vintage street lamps and illuminated stained glass windows embedded in the castle walls. The scene then opens into a wide overlook where the camera descends snow-covered stairs past a dramatic horse statue on a pedestal, offering a brief view of the valley below. Finally, the movement leads the character away from the elements and into a covered walkway defined by ornate stone arches and pillars bathed in soft, artificial light.
